name: inspect
description:
Shows active persona components currently loaded in your template.

Usage notes:
- Returns each component with its slot key (e.g., slot: 001, slot: 040.01)
- Use this tool to verify which components are active before adding or removing
- Slot keys show replacement relationships between components

name: thrift
description:
Try inline text overrides without creating manifest files. Used to experiment with options before committing to permanent files.

Usage notes:
- Adds inline text override to template using slot key syntax
- Format: SLOT_KEY - virtual/path/name: content text
- Replaces any existing component in the same slot (file or inline)
- Remove with standard remove tool by matching name or slot key
- Ideal for testing variations quickly

virtual_path.description: Organizational path for the override (e.g., output/tone/custom_name)

content.description: The text content to inject at this slot

name: talent
description:
Temporarily loads a talent component with automatic cleanup after specified duration.

Usage notes:
- Loads talent from 015_talents section for specified time
- Auto-removes talent when timer expires
- Talent descriptions are read from frontmatter at runtime
- Use for temporary context injection (prompting expertise, techniques, knowledge)

talent_name.description: Name of talent file to load (without .md extension)
